## TRM1.2. Terminal capacity incentive scheme {#trm1.2.-terminal-capacity-incentive-scheme .Heading-2-TZ}

In the first year of RP4, with an ATFM arrival delay of 0.28 min/arr, Ireland **did not achieve the national target** of 0.20 min/arr.

However, the pivot value for incentives (0.10 min/arr) is limited to CRSTMP delay causes. As there was **no CRSTMP delay** (0.00 min/arr), the maximum bonus applies, nevertheless the **maximum bonus is 0%** as per the Performance Plan. As such, the NSA computes a bonus of EUR 0.00.
